еҚ°еәҰеҢ—йҳҝеқҺеҫ·йӮҰзҡ„йҰ–еәңеҫ·жӢүж•ҰжӯЈеңЁжҲҗдёәйҮҚиҰҒзҡ„ж•ҷиӮІе’ҢиҒҢдёҡеүҚжҷҜдёӯеҝғгҖӮ йҡҸзқҖеҜ№еӣҪйҷ…ж•ҷиӮІе’Ңз§»ж°‘зҡ„йңҖжұӮдёҚж–ӯеўһй•ҝпјҢиҜҘеёӮи§ҒиҜҒдәҶеӨҡе®¶з•ҷеӯҰйЎҫй—®гҖҒйӣ…жҖқжңәжһ„е’Ңз§»ж°‘йЎҫй—®зҡ„жҲҗз«ӢгҖӮ иҝҷдәӣжңәжһ„еңЁеё®еҠ©жңүжҠұиҙҹзҡ„еӯҰз”ҹе’ҢдёӘдәәе®һзҺ°еҮәеӣҪз•ҷеӯҰжўҰжғігҖҒжҸҗй«ҳиҜӯиЁҖиғҪеҠӣе’Ңй©ҫй©ӯеӨҚжқӮзҡ„з§»ж°‘зЁӢеәҸж–№йқўеҸ‘жҢҘзқҖиҮіе…ійҮҚиҰҒзҡ„дҪңз”ЁгҖӮ еңЁжң¬ж–ҮдёӯпјҢжҲ‘д»¬е°ҶжҺўи®Ёиҝҷдәӣжңәжһ„еңЁеҸ°жӢүзҷ»зҡ„ж„Ҹд№үе’ҢеҘҪеӨ„гҖӮ

еҸ°жӢүзҷ»зҡ„жө·еӨ–ж•ҷиӮІйЎҫй—®е……еҪ“еӯҰз”ҹдёҺеӣҪеӨ–еӨ§еӯҰд№Ӣй—ҙзҡ„жЎҘжўҒгҖӮ д»–д»¬еңЁж•ҙдёӘиҝҮзЁӢдёӯжҸҗдҫӣе…Ёйқўзҡ„жҢҮеҜје’Ңж”ҜжҢҒпјҢд»ҺйҖүжӢ©еҗҲйҖӮзҡ„иҜҫзЁӢе’ҢеӨ§еӯҰеҲ°еӨ„зҗҶз”іиҜ·жөҒзЁӢгҖҒзӯҫиҜҒеҚҸеҠ©е’ҢиЎҢеүҚз®ҖжҠҘгҖӮ иҝҷдәӣйЎҫй—®жӢҘжңүе…ідәҺеҗ„з§ҚеӯҰд№ зӣ®зҡ„ең°гҖҒеҘ–еӯҰйҮ‘е’Ңе…ҘеӯҰиҰҒжұӮзҡ„жңҖж–°дҝЎжҒҜпјҢдҪҝеӯҰз”ҹиғҪеӨҹеҒҡеҮәжҳҺжҷәзҡ„еҶіе®ҡгҖӮ

дё“е®¶иҫ…еҜјпјҡж•ҷиӮІйЎҫй—®жҸҗдҫӣдёӘжҖ§еҢ–зҡ„иҫ…еҜјиҜҫзЁӢпјҢдәҶи§ЈеӯҰз”ҹзҡ„еҝ—еҗ‘гҖҒеӯҰжңҜиғҢжҷҜе’ҢиҒҢдёҡзӣ®ж ҮгҖӮ ж №жҚ®иҝҷдәӣдҝЎжҒҜпјҢд»–д»¬дјҡй’ҲеҜ№з¬ҰеҗҲеӯҰз”ҹе…ҙи¶Је’ҢиғҪеҠӣзҡ„еҗҲйҖӮиҜҫзЁӢгҖҒеӨ§еӯҰе’ҢеӣҪе®¶жҸҗдҫӣжҢҮеҜјгҖӮ

е…ҘеӯҰеҚҸеҠ©пјҡйЎҫй—®еҚҸеҠ©е®ҢжҲҗе’ҢжҸҗдәӨз”іиҜ·пјҢзЎ®дҝқйҒөе®ҲжҲӘжӯўж—Ҙжңҹе’Ңж–Үд»¶иҰҒжұӮгҖӮ д»–д»¬иҝҳе®ЎжҹҘз”іиҜ·и®әж–Үе№¶жҸҗдҫӣжңүд»·еҖјзҡ„еҸҚйҰҲпјҢд»ҘжҸҗй«ҳиҺ·еҫ—еҪ•еҸ–зҡ„жңәдјҡгҖӮ

зӯҫиҜҒж”ҜжҢҒпјҡжөҸи§ҲзӯҫиҜҒз”іиҜ·жөҒзЁӢеҸҜиғҪж—ўеӨҚжқӮеҸҲиҖ—ж—¶гҖӮ жө·еӨ–ж•ҷиӮІйЎҫй—®йҖҡиҝҮжҢҮеҜјеӯҰз”ҹе®ҢжҲҗж–Үд»¶гҖҒйқўиҜ•еҮҶеӨҮе’ҢзӯҫиҜҒз”іиҜ·зЁӢеәҸжқҘз®ҖеҢ–иҝҷдёҖиҝҮзЁӢпјҢд»ҺиҖҢеўһеҠ иҺ·еҫ—еӯҰд№ зӯҫиҜҒзҡ„еҸҜиғҪжҖ§гҖӮ

еӣҪйҷ…иӢұиҜӯиҜӯиЁҖжөӢиҜ•зі»з»ҹ (IELTS) жҳҜдёҖйЎ№е№ҝжіӣи®ӨеҸҜзҡ„й’ҲеҜ№йқһиӢұиҜӯжҜҚиҜӯиҖ…зҡ„иҜӯиЁҖиғҪеҠӣжөӢиҜ•гҖӮ еҸ°жӢүзҷ»жӢҘжңүеӨҡе®¶и‘—еҗҚзҡ„йӣ…жҖқиҖғиҜ•жңәжһ„пјҢиҝҷдәӣжңәжһ„жҸҗдҫӣдё“дёҡеҹ№и®ӯпјҢеё®еҠ©дёӘдәәиҺ·еҫ—зҗҶжғізҡ„еҲҶж•°гҖӮ

з»јеҗҲеҹ№и®ӯпјҡеҸ°жӢүзҷ»зҡ„йӣ…жҖқиҖғиҜ•жңәжһ„жҸҗдҫӣе…Ёйқўзҡ„еҹ№и®ӯи®ЎеҲ’пјҢж¶өзӣ–иҖғиҜ•зҡ„еҗ„дёӘж–№йқўпјҢеҢ…жӢ¬еҗ¬еҠӣгҖҒйҳ…иҜ»гҖҒеҶҷдҪңе’ҢеҸЈиҜӯжЁЎеқ—гҖӮ з»ҸйӘҢдё°еҜҢзҡ„еҹ№и®ӯеёҲйҮҮз”Ёжңүж•Ҳзҡ„ж•ҷеӯҰж–№жі•гҖҒдёӘжҖ§еҢ–зҡ„е…іжіЁе’Ңз»ғд№ жқҗж–ҷжқҘжҸҗй«ҳиҖғз”ҹзҡ„иҜӯиЁҖжҠҖиғҪгҖӮ

жЁЎжӢҹжөӢиҜ•е’ҢеҸҚйҰҲпјҡжңәжһ„е®ҡжңҹжЁЎжӢҹе®һйҷ…иҖғиҜ•зҺҜеўғиҝӣиЎҢжЁЎжӢҹжөӢиҜ•гҖӮ иҝҷдәӣжөӢиҜ•её®еҠ©иҖғз”ҹзҶҹжӮүжөӢиҜ•еҪўејҸпјҢзЎ®е®ҡд»–д»¬зҡ„дјҳеҠҝе’ҢеҠЈеҠҝпјҢе№¶д»Һеҹ№и®ӯеёҲйӮЈйҮҢиҺ·еҫ—е®қиҙөзҡ„еҸҚйҰҲд»ҘжҸҗй«ҳд»–д»¬зҡ„иЎЁзҺ°гҖӮ

ж—¶й—ҙз®ЎзҗҶжҠҖе·§пјҡйӣ…жҖқиҖғиҜ•жңүж—¶й—ҙйҷҗеҲ¶пјҢиҰҒжұӮиҖғз”ҹеңЁи§„е®ҡзҡ„ж—¶й—ҙеҶ…еӣһзӯ”й—®йўҳгҖӮ еӯҰйҷўдёәиҖғз”ҹжҸҗдҫӣжңүж•Ҳзҡ„ж—¶й—ҙз®ЎзҗҶзӯ–з•ҘпјҢд»ҘзЎ®дҝқд»–д»¬иғҪеӨҹеҮҶзЎ®й«ҳж•Ҳең°е®ҢжҲҗиҖғиҜ•зҡ„жүҖжңүйғЁеҲҶгҖӮ

еҸ°жӢүзҷ»зҡ„з§»ж°‘йЎҫй—®дё“й—ЁдёәеҜ»жұӮз§»ж°‘еҲ°е…¶д»–еӣҪе®¶зҡ„дёӘдәәжҸҗдҫӣжҢҮеҜје’Ңеё®еҠ©гҖӮ д»–д»¬еҜ№з§»ж°‘жі•гҖҒзЁӢеәҸе’Ңж–Үд»¶иҰҒжұӮжңүж·ұе…Ҙзҡ„дәҶи§ЈпјҢзЎ®дҝқйЎәеҲ©е’Ңж— еҝ§зҡ„иҝҮзЁӢгҖӮ

Introduction:

Dehradun, the capital city of Uttarakhand in India, is emerging as a prominent hub for education and career prospects. With the growing demand for international education and immigration, the city has witnessed the establishment of several overseas education consultants, IELTS institutes, and immigration consultants. These institutions play a vital role in assisting aspiring students and individuals in fulfilling their dreams of studying abroad, acquiring language proficiency, and navigating the complex immigration process. In this article, we will explore the significance and benefits of these institutions in Dehradun.

*Overseas Education Consultants:
*
Overseas education consultants in Dehradun act as a bridge between students and universities abroad. They offer comprehensive guidance and support throughout the entire process, from selecting the right course and university to handling the application process, visa assistance, and pre-departure briefings. These consultants have up-to-date information on various study destinations, scholarships, and admission requirements, enabling students to make well-informed decisions.

*Key Benefits:
*
Expert Counseling: Education consultants provide personalized counseling sessions to understand the students' aspirations, academic background, and career goals. Based on this information, they offer guidance on suitable courses, universities, and countries that align with the students' interests and abilities.

Admission Assistance: Consultants assist in completing and submitting applications, ensuring compliance with deadlines and documentation requirements. They also review application essays and provide valuable feedback to enhance the chances of securing admission.

Visa Support: Navigating the visa application process can be complex and time-consuming. Overseas education consultants simplify this process by guiding students through the documentation, interview preparation, and visa application procedures, increasing the likelihood of obtaining a study visa.

*IELTS Institutes:
*
The International English Language Testing System (IELTS) is a widely recognized language proficiency test for non-native English speakers. Dehradun boasts several reputable IELTS institutes that offer specialized training to help individuals achieve their desired band scores.

*Key Benefits:
*
Comprehensive Training: IELTS institutes in Dehradun provide comprehensive training programs that cover all aspects of the test, including listening, reading, writing, and speaking modules. Experienced trainers employ effective teaching methods, personalized attention, and practice materials to improve the candidates' language skills.

Mock Tests and Feedback: Institutes conduct regular mock tests simulating the actual exam environment. These tests help candidates become familiar with the test format, identify their strengths and weaknesses, and receive valuable feedback from trainers to enhance their performance.

Time Management Skills: IELTS exams are time-bound, requiring candidates to answer questions within specified time limits. Institutes equip candidates with effective time management strategies to ensure they can complete all sections of the test accurately and efficiently.

*Immigration Consultants:
*
Immigration consultants in Dehradun specialize in providing guidance and assistance to individuals seeking to immigrate to other countries. They possess in-depth knowledge of immigration laws, procedures, and documentation requirements, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free process.

*Key Benefits:
*
Eligibility Assessment: Immigration consultants evaluate individuals' eligibility for immigration based on factors such as education, work experience, language proficiency, and age. Application Assistance: Consultants assist in compiling and submitting immigration applications, ensuring all necessary documents are complete and accurate. They also guide individuals through medical examinations, police clearances, and other requirements to meet the immigration criteria.

Interview Preparation: Many countries require immigration applicants to attend interviews as part of the selection process. Immigration consultants provide interview preparation sessions, equipping individuals with the necessary skills and confidence to present themselves effectively.

еҺҹж–Ү:

Multiple Linear Regression is a statistical model used to find relationship between dependent variable and multiple independent variables. This model helps us to find how different variables contribute to outcome or predictions. In this article we will see how to implement it using python language from data preparation to model evaluation.

1. Understanding Multiple Linear Regression :

In simple linear regression only one independent and dependent variables are there. So Multiple Linear Regression extends this capacity of simple linear regression. Means there can many number of independent variables in Multiple Linear Regression.

General Equation for Multiple Linear Regression is as follow -

y = ОІвӮҖ + ОІвӮҒxвӮҒ + ОІвӮӮxвӮӮ + ... + ОІвӮҡxвӮҡ + Йӣ

where,

  • y is the dependent variable
  • ОІвӮҖ is the intercept (means value of y when value of x is zero)
  • ОІвӮҒ, ОІвӮӮ, ..., ОІвӮҡ are the coefficients.
  • xвӮҒ, xвӮӮ, ..., xвӮҡ are the independent variables.
  • Йӣ represents error terms.

2. Data Preparation :

It is the fundamental step in any Machine Learning Model. Because before feeding to model data should be clean, without any missing values, and all values should be in numeric.

Below are some code examples -

## Importing Libraries
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

## Loading Data
m_data = pd.read_csv("50_Startups.csv")

## Checking for missing values
m_data.isnull().sum()

## Creating dependent and independent variables.
x = m_data.iloc[:, :-1].values
y = m_data.iloc[:, -1].values

Encoding Categorical Variables :

It is necessary to encode categorical values in the form of numbers. Because model don't accepts categorical values like string, characters etc. In this article we will be using one hot encoding.

Refer link for more information on one hot encoder.

from sklearn.compose import ColumnTransformer
from sklearn.preprocessing import OneHotEncoder
ct = ColumnTransformer(transformers=[('encoder', OneHotEncoder(),[3])],remainder='passthrough')
x = np.array(ct.fit_transform(x))

Splitting Dataset into training and test set :

By splitting the dataset into training and test set we can train our model using training set and evaluate our model using test set. So this is also an important step if you don't have testing dataset seperately.

from sklearn.model_selectiom import train_test_split
x_train, x_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(x, y, test_size=0.2, random_state=21)

For more data preparation tools refer this Link.

3. Model Training and Evaluation :

Now in this step we will train our multiple linear regression model using training set and evaluate it using test set.

Model Training - 

from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression
mlr = LinearRegression()
mlr.fit(x_train,y_train)

Predicting - 

y_pred = mlr.predict(y_test)

Model Evaluation -

we will use mean squared error (MSE) for evaluating our model.

from sklearn.metrics import mean_squared_error
mse = mean_squared_error(y_test,y_pred)

To learn more on Mean Squared Error (MSE) refer this Link

4. Interpreting Coefficients :

The coefficients in multiple linear regression equation determines the relationship between each independent and dependent variable. If value of coefficient is positive then it shows positive relationship between two variables, while negative value shows negative relationship.

Below is the python code which will generate a data frame which will contains columns name and coefficient value of that column from data.

coefficients = pd.DataFrame({"Variable":m_data.columns,"Coefficient":mlr.coef_})
print(coefficients)

5. Model Evaluation using plots :

We can use various diagnostic plots to evaluate the performance of model or diagnose any issue.

Below is the python code for plot -

import matplotlib.pytplot as plt # residuals vs Predicted values
residuals = y_test - y_pred
plt.scatter(y_pred, residuals)
plt.axhline(y=0, color='r', linestyle='-')
plt.xlabel("Predicted Values")
plt.ylabel("Residuals")
plt.title("Residuals vs. Predicted Values")
plt.show()

There are different diagnostic plans for models. You can refer below links for more information.

  • Creating Diagnostic Plots in Python
  • Linear regression diagnostics in Python

Conclusion :

We have learned implementation of Multiple Linear Regression using python. Also with that we learned data preparation, model evaluation etc.

So by following these steps and using code examples provided, you can easily implement Multiple Linear Regression in your own projects.

  • sklearn: Mean Squared Error Documentation - Link

  • Seaborn Documentation for Various Diagnostic plots - Link.

  • Matplotlib Documentation for Visualization - Link.
